title: ICAT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICAT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
